title: Japanese Foods - JF
description:
Adds Japanese classic foods to Minecraft!

I'm not completely sure about the Client and Server sides, but it works in single-player. Please be careful with this!
body:
Japanese Foods - JF

- This mod is in beta. It's being worked on

- It may have bugs. It was made using MCreator

-Textures are bad. I'll fix it

- Not yet compatible with other mods

- Use JEI if needed!


ATTENTION! This is a rework of the original CF version!


Japanese Foods, or JF for short, adds classic Japanese foods to our beloved game, Minecraft.

In July 2023 the mod has:

- 3 foods

- 12 items

- 11 recipes

- 3 advancements

- 3 trades

Ramens:

- Shio Ramen

- Shoyu Ramen

- Miso Ramen

Trades:

Farmer for Vegetables

Fisherman for Fish Broth

Butcher for Chicken Stock

I'm not completely sure about the Client and Server sides, but it works in single-player. Please be careful with this!
